title: verbascum varians
intro: Verbascum varians, also known as the variegated mullein, is a flowering plant species within the mullein genus, characterized by its unique variegated foliage and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum varians have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum varians include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions. Verbascum varians can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
